description: The Is Child Of node determines if the ``Instance`` slot is a descendant of the ``Other`` slot. This check is recursive.

fields.IncludingSelf: If ``True``, the node will return ``True`` if ``Instance`` is the same slot as ``Other``. Otherwise, the node will return ``False`` in this case.
fields.* ([[Types:Bool|bool]]): Returns ``True`` if ``Instance`` is a descendant of the ``Other`` slot. Otherwise, returns ``False``
